016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection;
017
018import java.lang.reflect.Method;
019import java.util.Map;
020
021/**
022 * Implementation of {@link JsonRpcServiceWrapper} that takes a delegate
023 * object in the constructor.
024 * <p>
025 * Use this class when
026 */
027public class DelegatingJsonRpcService extends AbstractJsonRpcService {
028    private final Object service;
029
030    /**
031     * Use this constructor for simplicity and if you don't need GraalVM support
032     * @param serviceObject the service object to wrap.
033     */
034    public DelegatingJsonRpcService(Object serviceObject) {
035        this(JsonRpcServiceWrapper.reflect(serviceObject.getClass()), serviceObject);
036    }
037
038    /**
039     * Use this constructor for GraalVM compatibility and make sure your {@code methods} {@link Map}
040     * was statically initialized.
041     *
042     * @param serviceObject The service object to wrap
043     * @param methods A map that maps method-name strings to {@link Method} objects.
044     */
045    public DelegatingJsonRpcService(Map<String, Method> methods, Object serviceObject) {
046        super(methods);
047        this.service = serviceObject;
048    }
049
050    @Override
051    public Object getServiceObject() {
052        return service;
053    }
054
055    @Override
056    public void close() throws Exception {
057    }
058}
